description: A backroom associate needs to receive a daily shipment of goods from the distribution center.

nodes.task_description: Scan the barcode on the delivery manifest to pull up the shipment details in the inventory system.

expected_outcome.value: The system displays the list of items and quantities expected in the shipment.

nodes.task_description: Unload the truck and scan the barcode on each carton received.

expected_outcome.value: Each carton is scanned to confirm it has been received.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge receipt of the full shipment in the system, noting any discrepancies (e.g., a missing carton).

expected_outcome.value: The store's inventory on-hand is increased by the received amounts, and the shipment is marked as 'Received'.
